task_completion.description: The agent successfully loaded the patient CT data into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface is visible with abdominal CT slices (axial, sagittal, or coronal views) loaded. The Data module or window title may reference 'IRCADb' or 'Patient 5'.

task_completion.description: The agent used measurement tools to determine the dimensions of the hepatic lesion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the 'Markups' module, 'Ruler', or 'Line' tool being used. Colored lines should be visible overlaid on a hypodense (darker) region within the liver parenchyma on the CT viewer.

task_completion.description: The agent measured distances from the lesion to critical structures (veins, capsule).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Additional measurement lines visible connecting the lesion to bright vascular structures (hepatic/portal veins) or the outer edge of the liver (capsule).

task_completion.description: The agent placed a markup point for the proposed probe entry site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A fiducial point or markup is placed on the skin surface or liver capsule, distinct from the measurement lines, indicating a trajectory path.

task_completion.description: The agent created the JSON report content with required classification fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying a JSON structure containing keys like 'lesion_dimensions_mm', 'suitability_classification', 'liver_segment', and 'rationale'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the measurement markup and the assessment report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Data' dialog, file explorer, or terminal listing showing 'lesion_measurements.mrk.json' and 'ablation_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent must use the 3D Slicer GUI tools to perform measurements, not estimate them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with Slicer toolbars (e.g., Markups module) and the 3D/2D viewers, not just a script running in a terminal.

integrity.description: Measurements in the report must correspond to visual actions taken in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not produce the JSON report with specific numbers without first having visually placed measurement lines on the scan in previous steps.

integrity.description: The agent should not copy-paste a pre-written solution block.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation should involve typing or programmatic construction based on variables, not pasting a large block of text instantly without context.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is 3D-IRCADb-01, Patient 5. The liver lesion is a hypodense (darker) spot within the liver tissue. Hepatic veins appear as branching bright structures when contrast is enhanced. The VLM should verify that the agent is interacting with this specific patient data.
